name: Peace Education
title: Peace Education
description: Comprehensive peace education workshops for schools and communities, teaching conflict resolution and peaceful communication skills across East Africa.

name: Youth Empowerment Initiative
title: Youth Empowerment Initiative
description: Empowering young leaders through mentorship programs, skills training, and community service opportunities in 12 communities across 5 countries.

name: Community Reconciliation
title: Community Reconciliation
description: Facilitating dialogue and reconciliation processes in communities affected by conflict and division across the Great Lakes region.

name: Peace Leader Training
title: Peace Leader Training
description: Intensive leadership development program for emerging peace leaders and community organizers from 20 African nations.

name: Global Peace Summit 2026
title: Global Peace Summit 2026
description: Annual international conference bringing together peace advocates, leaders, and organizations from around the world in Nairobi.

name: Girls Education Initiative
title: Girls Education Initiative
description: Breaking barriers to girls' education through scholarships, mentorship programs, and community advocacy in rural communities across 8 regions.

name: Clean Water Access
title: Clean Water Access
description: Building sustainable water wells and purification systems for 50 communities facing water scarcity across Kenya's arid and semi-arid regions.

name: Healthcare Outreach
title: Healthcare Outreach
description: Mobile health clinics bringing essential healthcare services including vaccinations, maternal care, and health education to remote villages.

name: Sustainable Agriculture
title: Sustainable Agriculture
description: Training farmers in climate-resilient farming techniques, providing improved seeds and tools to 2,000 families across 5 agricultural regions.

name: Digital Literacy for All
title: Digital Literacy for All
description: Bridging the digital divide by providing computer labs, internet access, and digital skills training to students in 100 underserved schools.

name: Emergency Relief Fund
title: Emergency Relief Fund
description: Rapid emergency response providing food, shelter, and medical aid to communities affected by natural disasters and humanitarian crises across East Africa.

name: Women Empowerment Program
title: Women Empowerment Program
description: Empowering women through entrepreneurship training, financial literacy, and leadership development programs in 15 communities across 6 countries.

name: Climate Resilience Initiative
title: Climate Resilience Initiative
description: Helping farming communities adapt to climate change through drought-resistant crops, water conservation techniques, and reforestation programs across 5 regions.

name: Orphanage Support Program
title: Orphanage Support Program
description: Providing nutritious meals, school supplies, and psychosocial support to orphaned children across 25 care centers in Rwanda, DRC, and Burundi.

name: Sports for Peace
title: Sports for Peace
description: Uniting communities through sports tournaments and youth leagues that promote teamwork, mutual respect, and cross-cultural understanding across 30 communities.

name: Refugee Support Program
title: Refugee Support Program
description: Providing shelter, education, and livelihood support to refugee families resettling in host communities across East Africa.

name: Mental Health Initiative
title: Mental Health Initiative
description: Providing trauma counseling, mental health first aid training, and psychosocial support to communities affected by conflict and displacement.

name: Microfinance for Women
title: Microfinance for Women
description: Providing small business loans, financial literacy training, and mentorship to women entrepreneurs in underserved communities.

name: School Feeding Program
title: School Feeding Program
description: Ensuring every child receives at least one nutritious meal per school day, improving attendance and academic performance across 200 schools.

name: Peace Journalism Training
title: Peace Journalism Training
description: Training local journalists in conflict-sensitive reporting and peace journalism to promote understanding and reduce ethnic tension in media coverage.

name: Art for Peace Program
title: Art for Peace Program
description: Using music, theater, dance, and visual arts to heal trauma, bridge divides, and amplify youth voices in post-conflict communities.

name: Disaster Preparedness
title: Disaster Preparedness
description: Building community resilience through early warning systems, emergency response training, and stockpiling essential supplies in disaster-prone regions.

name: Tree Planting Campaign
title: Tree Planting Campaign
description: Restoring degraded landscapes by planting 1 million trees across East Africa, combating desertification, and creating green jobs for local communities.

name: Vocational Skills Training
title: Vocational Skills Training
description: Equipping out-of-school youth with marketable skills in carpentry, tailoring, IT, and renewable energy installation for sustainable livelihoods.

name: Interfaith Dialogue Initiative
title: Interfaith Dialogue Initiative
description: Bringing together religious leaders and communities from different faith traditions to build mutual understanding and prevent faith-based violence.
